ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "car_model" TEXT /* Name of the car model (e.g., Mercedes-Benz C63 AMG) */,
  "car_year" INTEGER /* Year of the car model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the car model */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the car's image */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the car (e.g., Mercedes-Benz, BMW) */,
  "model_series" TEXT /* Series of the car model (e.g., C-Class, 3 Series) */,
  "engine_size" TEXT /* Size of the car's engine */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive (e.g., rear-wheel drive, all-wheel drive) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., gasoline, diesel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model being listed */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller listing the car */,
  "price" TEXT /* Current price of the car */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the car (e.g., city, state) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the car (e.g., excellent, good, fair) */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the car */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "vehicle_title" TEXT /* Type of vehicle title (e.g., clean, salvage) */,
  "accident_history" TEXT /* Accident history of the car (e.g., yes/no) */,
  "previous_owners" INTEGER /* Number of previous owners */,
  "maintenance_history" TEXT /* Maintenance history of the car (e.g., records available/not available) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "seller_type" TEXT /* Type of seller (e.g., individual, dealership) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the buyer */,
  "buyer_type" TEXT /* Type of buyer (e.g., individual, business) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being purchased */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer making the purchase */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "delivery_location" TEXT /* Location of delivery (e.g., home, office) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being paid for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the car model on a specific date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the price was recorded */,
  "price_type" TEXT /* Type of price (e.g., sale, trade-in, market value) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition record */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the car (e.g., excellent, good, fair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the car's condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., cosmetic, mechanical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mileages" (
  "mileage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mileage record */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the car */,
  "odometer_reading" INTEGER /* Odometer reading of the car */,
  "mileage_type" TEXT /* Type of mileage (e.g., actual, estimated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mileage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mileages_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location record */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the car (e.g., city, state) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the car's location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the car's location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the car's location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the car's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., price drop, new listing) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer who left the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the review (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)
